goal: Understand how gift cards work with promos.
success_criteria: Agent explains: gift card is a payment method entered at checkout, CAN be used alongside one promo code (gift cards pay, promos discount), balance in Account > Gift Cards, no expiry, not redeemable for cash.

customer_msg: I got a Loomora gift card for my birthday. How do I use it, and can I stack it with SUMMER20?
agent_msg: Great! Gift cards can be redeemed at checkout. Just enter the card number and PIN when prompted during the payment process. Regarding the SUMMER20 promo code, you can use it on the same order, but keep in mind that you can only use one promo code per order. The SUMMER20 code gives you 20% off orders of $75 or more and is valid through July 31.

customer_msg: I see. So I can use both the gift card and the SUMMER20 code together, but I can't use any other promo codes with them?
agent_msg: That's correct! You can use both the gift card and the SUMMER20 code together, but you can only use one promo code per order. So, you won't be able to use any additional promo codes with them. If you have any other questions, feel free to ask!
You're welcome! If you have any other questions or need further assistance, feel free to ask. I'm here to help!
